title: Republic Services (RSG) Q3 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Republic Services (RSG) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.54 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.41 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.34 per share a year ago.

title: Republic Services, Inc. (RSG) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Republic Services, Inc. (NYSE:RSG ) Q3 2023 Earnings Conference Call October 26, 2023 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Aaron Evans - Vice President, Investor Relations Jon Vander Ark - Chief Executive Officer Brian DelGhiaccio - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Toni Kaplan - Morgan Stanley Bryan Burgmeier - Citi Tyler Brown - Raymond James Noah Kaye - Oppenheimer Michael Hoffman - Stifel David Manthey - Baird Jerry Revich - Goldman Sachs Stephanie Moore - Jefferies Tobey Sommer - Truist Kevin Chiang - CIBC Operator Good afternoon, and welcome to the Republic Services' Third Quarter 2023 Investor Conference Call. Republic Services is traded on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol RSG.

title: Republic Services, Inc. Reports Third Quarter 2023 Results
text: Reported Earnings Per Share of $1.52 and Adjusted Earnings Per Share of $1.54 Expanded Net Income Margin 100 Basis Points and Adjusted EBITDA Margin 70 Basis Points Generated Cash Flow from Operations of $2,719 Million and Adjusted Free Cash Flow of $1,827 Million Invested More Than $900 Million in Value-Creating Acquisitions Board Authorized $3 Billion For Share Repurchases Certified as a Great Place to Work® for the Seventh Consecutive Year PHOENIX , Oct. 26, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Republic Services, Inc. (NYSE: RSG) today reported net income of $480.2 million, or $1.52 per diluted share, for the three months ended September 30, 2023, versus $416.9 million, or $1.32 per diluted share, for the comparable 2022 period. Excluding certain expenses and other items, on an adjusted basis, net income for the three months ended September 30, 2023, was $488.3 million, or $1.54 per diluted share, versus $425.4 million, or $1.34 per diluted share, for the comparable 2022 period.
